text.title: AI-Generated IaC Review Gate Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply ai-generated-iac-review-gate. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Mark PR as AI-assisted
step.description: Input: PR template. Action: Author selects AI-assisted yes/no + tool used.. Output: Tagged PR..

step.name: Run automated gate
step.description: Input: Tagged PR. Action: Secrets / policy / plan-diff / drift checks.. Output: Gate report..

step.name: Classify blast radius
step.description: Input: Gate report + PR scope. Action: Low / medium / high.. Output: Classified PR..
step.note: Step 3. Required input: Gate report + PR scope.

step.name: Route reviewers
step.description: Input: Classified PR. Action: Pick reviewers per blast radius.. Output: Review request set..

step.name: Capture decisions
step.description: Input: Reviewer feedback. Action: Block / approve / request changes; record sign-offs.. Output: Decision log entry..
